scripts.test: FORCE_COLOR=true npx playwright test scenarios/01-home-and-login.spec.ts scenarios/02-folder-management.spec.ts
scripts.test:containers: OXICLOUD_E2E_CONTAINERS=1 FORCE_COLOR=true npx playwright test -c playwright.containers.config.ts
scripts.build:spa: cd ../../frontend && COVERAGE=1 VITE_E2E=1 npm run build
